revision.comment: new key for [[Category:6th-century religious buildings and structures]]: " +Buddhist temples" using [[WP:HC|HotCat]]
revision.text:
This category is for Buddhist temples built in the 6th century. {{Navseasoncats}}
[[Category:Buddhist temples by century| 06]] [[Category:6th-century religious buildings and structures| +Buddhist temples]] [[Category:6th-century Buddhism|Temp]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵}}" to ""
